Ivan Zazzaroni, director of Corriere dello Sport, spoke about the future of Massimiliano Allegri in his speech on Radio Rossonera. These are his statements:

Director, do you still see Milan in Allegri's future?

“I can't tell you.

articles.title: World Cup, former FIFA Christillin: "Who instead of Iran? FIFA can decide what it wants"
articles.summary: (ANSA) - ROME, MARCH 04 - "If Iran does not go to the World Cup, FIFA can decide to do what it wants with the substitutes but it is likely that the chosen one will be from the Asian countries, at the moment I would say Iraq and the Emirates".
